status_line: Monday 7:40 AM ET / 11:40 AM UTC — eighth hour of the morning. SCOUT's Apollo enrichment landed clean at 11:07 UTC: 9 new EP/Head-of-Production emails verified across Sanctuary Content, Doomsday, Curious Film, Spy, Exit, Good Oil, Velocity, Romance, and Egg Films, all pushed live to the Google Sheet (rows 100–169) and appended to apollo_email_results.csv (now 31 verified rows). 5 shops attempted but didn't resolve in Apollo (Bullitt, Hungry Man Brasil, HSI Productions, Standard Films, Plaza Films). One small data correction logged — Doomsday's domain is doomsdayent.com, not the doomsday.tv pattern guess. Credit budget healthy at ~31/60 for the month. SARAH Run 119 at 11:04 UTC was the third consecutive Downloads-blocked sweep but surfaced one fresh JARVIS-relevant Documents write — 'JARVIS-morning-brief-2026-04-27.md' (2,590 B, written 10:08 UTC) — and added it as new Open Item #10 with explicit adoption commands. Tray now stands at 10. Output tree grew to 1,058 files (+5 vs. Run 118): one genuine new production file, scout-pipeline-2026-04-27.md (16.5 KB), already canonically located in big-new-business/daily-scout-reports/; the other +4 are .git index churn inside the dashboard subproject. GUARDIAN ticked to 54 consecutive missed cycles. No new MAESTRO/WRITER output since 02:46 UTC. Lands' End now T-3 days.
